case_title: LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION VS. DONG SAN SANG TON ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT DONG SAN SANG TON ASSOCIATION DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-28-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONG SAN SANG TON ASSOCIATION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1142 GRANT AVENUE, 2ND FLOOR, SAN FRANCISCO $7,000.00 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $290.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,040.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE. $33.33 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DONG SAN SANG TON ASSOCIATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION SERVED SEP-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DONG SAN SANG TON ASSOCIATION
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DONG SAN SANG TON ASSOCIATION
REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-28-2011. CASE SETTLED WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. (206)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DONG SAN SANG TON ASSOCIATION
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTRY OF JUDGEMNT PURSUANT TO STIP FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF NOTICE OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIM'S FAMILY BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT DONG SAN SANG TON ASSOCIATION
ORDER GRANTING EX-PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
